# Arun Kumar Dixit ## (Project Head –State Level ITMS, Chhattisgarh Transport Deptt.) Cell: +91 - 9711334757 Mail_id : akdixit.3@gmail.com ### Experience Summary: Executing Organizational Objectives since **21+** yrs. and overseeing Projects, Executions in different Roles. Currently working in a role of **Program Manager** and Engaged with **SIs, PMCs, PSUs, Direct End Clients of Central & State Government,** OEMs Network and renowned Real State Groups (Elan, Godrej, ATS, M3M, Hero Homes etc.) * **12+ yrs** – Execute Large Government Projects (**Central and State Gov.**) in Smart City / Safe City, Worked in 02 State level DCs in **Electronics Security and Surveillance, ITMS, ICCC,** E – Governance, ELV Products in **SI Division.** * **9+ yrs** - Program / Project Management, Delivery of Projects, Application Dev, Sys Testing (**AT&T, BT, TechM**) * **Project Management** – Gov. Liaising, RFP/RFI & Bid evaluation, Looking S & L, Monitoring P & L, Working with Cross Functional Teams and OEMs, Resource Mgt., Effort Estimation, Assess Risks, Timely Execution * **Presales** – Preparing Techno – Commercial Proposals, Solution Designing, Prepare BoQ & Bare Costing, **Written 06 RFPs** with PMC (Gail, APSFL, Azadpur Mandi, NIT Delhi, Delhi Transport ITMS (FOBs), DTIDC) * **Business Development** – Proposing our Solutions & Credentials in Surveillance (5 Layers, ICCC, State Data Center, DR & DC), ITMS / ATCS, Body worn Solution, ELVs- Access Control Sys., VDPs, Boom Barrier etc. * **Delivery / Implementation / Ops Mgt** – Prepare Project Plan / Implementation Plan, Monitor SLAs (O n M), Once was looking 9 projects (New & Old) simultaneously * **Client Relation** - Regular Customer Visits, Understand Requirements and Offer Solution * **Revenue Generation** – Helping Sales team for Expansion/Extension of projects & Align Clients ### Experience Details: 1. Working with Technosys Integrated Solutions Pvt. Ltd. from Feb`26 as a **Project Head** 2. Worked with IRIS Global Solutions Pvt. Ltd. from April` 25 as a **Project Head** 3. Worked with ANG India Ltd. from Aug`24 at PAN India level as a **Senior Manager - Projects** 4. Worked with Matrix Security & Surveillance Pvt. Ltd. from Dec`22 in North Region as a **Project Manager** 5. Worked with SBD Green Energy & Infra India Pvt. Ltd. from July` 21 as a **General Manager - Projects** 6. Worked with Matrix Security & Surveillance Pvt Ltd. from June` 14 as a **Business Development Manager** 7. Worked with Credence Systems from June` 09 to June` 14 as a **System Analyst (IT & Telecom)** 8. Worked with Compucom Software Ltd. from Oct` 01 to Feb 07 as a **Software Engineer** ### Engaged in following Major Projects (last 11+ yrs): 1. **Implementation Head** of Chhattisgarh State – **ITMS (State level ITMS System) – 188 cr** 2. **Part of Core Team of Solution Designing** of APSFL – **ITMS & City Surv. (AP State level Surv. System) – 959 cr** 3. **Design Solution, Write RFP – 5 Layer** Security & Surveillance Project (ELAN group), Gurugram – **6.8 cr** 4. **Design Solution & Write RFP** - Azadpur Mandi Surveillance Proj. (APMC), Delhi – **4.8 cr** 5. **Design Solution & Write RFP** and Win & Implemented Bhorgarh Ind. Area, Delhi – **1.2 cr** 6. **Design Solution & Write RFP** of Inter-State Surveillance of Gail Gas Ltd. – **18 cr** 7. **Design Solution** of NIT, Delhi – **5.3 cr, Implemented** IIT, Sonipat – **.79 cr** 8. **Design Solution** of Delhi Metro Track Surveillance (Designed with Hitachi)- **840 cr** 9. **Design Solution** of Extension of Rohtak Safe City Project (Safe City - Surveillance & ITMS) – **25 cr** 10. **Implemented** - ITMS System for Bangalore phase – 2 City Surveillance Project - **95 cr** 11. **Implemented** - Parliament House Surveillance System (Old Building) – **24 cr** 12. **Implemented** - DTC Mobile Bus Surveillance System (2015 project) – **8 cr** 13. **Implemented** - Delhi Police City Surveillance with ECIL (6 Sites) – **15 cr** 14. **Implemented** - Janeshwar Mishra Park Surveillance Project, Lucknow – **14 cr** ### Education Summary: 1. **MBA** in Service Management (Pursuing) 2. **BE (Computer Science)** from CIITM, Jaipur, Rajasthan University with 68% 3. **PGDIT** from CSL, Jaipur with Honours (81%) 4. **Electronics & Communication Engineering** from IERT, Allahabad, UPTU with Honours (82%) --- # Certifications, Awards & Trainings (Project Management): 1. **PMP - PMI** (Pursuing) 3. **AI Generalist (Generative AI Mastermind)** 2. **Star Performer Award in Projects (BMC Patrol, AT&T, USA)** 4. **Business Writing Course** (Tech Mahindra) 5. **Assertive Communication** (Tech Mahindra) 6. **Verbal Communication Skill** (Tech Mahindra) 7. **Lateral Thinking** (Tech Mahindra) # Major Clients in North 1. Parliament House, Delhi Police, Delhi Metro, Delhi Transport – HQ, DTC 2. RISL, Jaipur, Chhattisgarh Transport Deptt., IIT Sonipat, NIT Delhi, APMC Azadpur - Delhi 3. Railtel, Airport Authority of India (AAI), Maruti 4. Gurugram Traffic Police, Municipal Corporation, Manesar Municipal Corporation 5. Gail Gas Ltd., Himachal Pradesh Road Transport, Hartron, 6. PSU as NMRC, TCIL, ECIL, BECIL, CEL, ITI etc. # Scope of working in SITC and OnM 1. Smart City 2. City Surveillance / Safe City Projects 3. ATCS & ITMS (Video based Technology & Radar based Technology) 4. Real Time Governance Command / Data Centers 5. IP Based Video Surveillance Systems 6. Mobile Bus Surveillance Systems 7.
